title: Adapt Steuerboard evidence to operator-native Bureau intake
goal: Consume existing Steuerboard artifacts only as a source adapter for the canonical operator-native candidate assessment and reviewed task proposal surface in OPERATOR-MACHINE-READABILITY-V1-T017; do not implement a second intake, deduplication or promotion authority.

acceptance.assertion: The adapter preserves source artifact path or opaque locator, content hash, generated-at or observed-at evidence and source kind in the canonical candidate record.
Steuerboard-specific code calls the T017 domain surface and contains no independent task generation, deduplication, review or publication rules.
Exact duplicate detection and bounded similarity suggestions are delegated to the canonical assessment surface; no semantic match is acted on automatically.
No candidate reaches a durable task proposal without explicit acceptance criteria, claims, approval class, source binding and unresolved-field reporting.
The adapter is consumable through the typed Grabowski route and requires no human shell work, file inspection or manual Registry JSON editing.

metadata.operator_lab_run: not applicable — planning task definition only

lease_scope_migration.rationale: Steuerboard candidates are interpreted by Bureau code and may create reviewed Registry task material only.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks

operator_native_reframe.reason: The user is observer and steersman; ChatGPT through Grabowski is the operator. Source-specific artifacts must feed one machine-first operator surface rather than create a human-oriented or duplicate workflow.
